pr.title: Match grShrineRoute_8020A104, cleanup callback function names
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Matched the Shrine Route stage function grShrineRoute_8020A104 and cleaned up several Shrine Route callback/function names across source, header, and GALE01 symbols. The new match models a stage-specific Ground gv layout for storing a classifier-0xC HSD_GObj, iterating its HSD_LObj chain, preserving LObj flags, caching helper-returned LObj pointers, and then calling grShrineRoute_8020A21C. The automated decomp.dev report credited one new match worth +272 bytes and a small .sdata improvement.

key_files.role: Implemented grShrineRoute_8020A104, added baselib debug/LObj includes, updated StageData callback pointers, and renamed callback/function definitions.
Renamed Shrine Route callback prototypes and replaced several UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototypes with concrete HSD_GObj, Ground_GObj, and HSD_LObj types.
Added grShrineroute_GroundVars2 to the Ground union and exposed fields used by grShrineRoute_8020A104.
Synchronized symbol names for callback renames and replaced generic fn_8020AD24/fn_8020AD58/fn_8020AE08 with grShrineRoute-prefixed names.

what_changed: Replaced the asm placeholder `/// #grShrineRoute_8020A104` with a C implementation.

The new grShrineRoute_8020A104 gets Ground data with GET_GROUND, walks `HSD_GObj_Entities->xC` until it finds a GObj whose classifier is `0xC`, asserts it exists with `HSD_ASSERT(1106, lgobj)`, stores it at `gp->gv.shrineroute2.xC4`, and calls grShrineRoute_8020AA40.

The matched function obtains an LObj list with GET_LOBJ, stores each HSD_LObj pointer starting at `xC8`, stores each LObj flags value starting at `x118`, counts entries in `x168`, then caches grShrineRoute_8020AB58 and grShrineRoute_8020AC44 results into `x16C` and `x170` before calling grShrineRoute_8020A21C.
Renamed StageData callbacks from raw address names to semantic callback names: OnDemoInit, OnInit, OnLoad, OnStart, OnTouchLine, and OnCheckShadowRender.
Renamed generic symbols/functions `fn_8020AD24`, `fn_8020AD58`, and `fn_8020AE08` to `grShrineRoute_8020AD24`, `grShrineRoute_8020AD58`, and `grShrineRoute_8020AE08`.

Added `grShrineroute_GroundVars2` with fields for `HSD_GObj* xC4`, `HSD_LObj* xC8`, `u32 x118`, `u32 x168`, `HSD_LObj* x16C`, and `HSD_LObj* x170`, then added it to the `Ground` union as `shrineroute2`.
Added or adjusted headers so the source/header can reference HSD_GObj, HSD_LObj, HSD_ASSERT, and LObj accessor APIs.
smart_moves: Introduced a dedicated Shrine Route ground-vars layout instead of forcing the match through opaque padding or unrelated stage structs.

Used minimal concrete offset-based fields plus pointer arithmetic, such as `(&gp->gv.shrineroute2.xC8)[idx]` and `(&gp->gv.shrineroute2.x118)[idx]`, to represent arrays whose full semantic names are still unknown.
Kept C source, public header prototypes, and GALE01 symbols synchronized during renaming, reducing stale address-only names and generic `fn_` symbols.
Matched the GObj/LObj traversal with baselib accessors and the original-looking assertion site, rather than open-coding list fields without helper calls.
Cleaned callback names at the same time as the match so StageData now documents standard stage lifecycle hooks directly.
decomp_lessons: For stage decomp, standard StageData callbacks should be renamed to `OnInit`, `OnDemoInit`, `OnLoad`, `OnStart`, `OnTouchLine`, and `OnCheckShadowRender` when their table roles are clear.
When a matched function reveals a second per-stage ground-var shape, add a new union variant such as `grShrineroute_GroundVars2` and preserve unknown semantics with offset-style `xNNN` names.
Concrete prototypes in headers can be enough to unblock a match: this PR refined several Shrine Route helpers from `UNK_RET`/`UNK_PARAMS` to HSD_GObj/HSD_LObj-aware signatures.
Object-list matches can depend on using the baselib APIs in the same order as the binary: `HSD_GObjGetClassifier`, `HSD_GObjGetNext`, GET_LOBJ, `HSD_LObjGetFlags`, and `HSD_LObjGetNext`.
The PR has no human body or review discussion in the slice, so the strongest impact evidence is the diff plus the automated decomp.dev match report.
naming_conventions: Generic `fn_8020AD24`, `fn_8020AD58`, and `fn_8020AE08` were renamed to the stage-prefixed `grShrineRoute_8020AD24`, `grShrineRoute_8020AD58`, and `grShrineRoute_8020AE08`.
Unknown struct members kept offset-style names such as `xC4`, `xC8`, `x118`, `x168`, `x16C`, and `x170`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Model the classifier search as a while loop over `HSD_GObj_Entities->xC`, advancing with `HSD_GObjGetNext` until `HSD_GObjGetClassifier(lgobj) == 0xC`.
Preserve the assert as `HSD_ASSERT(1106, lgobj)` after the classifier search.
Represent the LObj pointer table and flags table by taking the address of the first known field and indexing from it, matching the observed layout without overnaming every slot.
Store the LObj flags before advancing to `HSD_LObjGetNext(lobj)` and incrementing the count field `x168`; the order is visible in the matched C.
Cache helper results from grShrineRoute_8020AB58 and grShrineRoute_8020AC44 into ground vars before the final call to grShrineRoute_8020A21C.
review_feedback: No human PR body, review comments, or review approvals are present in the slice.
Automated decomp.dev report for GALE01: matched code 57.58%, +0.01%, +272 bytes.
Automated decomp.dev reported one new match: `main/melee/gr/grshrineroute` item `grShrineRoute_8020A104`, 0.00% before to 100.00% after, +272 bytes.
Automated decomp.dev also reported `.sdata` improvement of +10 bytes, 0.00% before to 19.35% after.
follow_up_queries: Search for remaining Shrine Route placeholders such as grShrineRoute_8020AA40, grShrineRoute_8020AB58, grShrineRoute_8020AC44, grShrineRoute_8020AD58, grShrineRoute_8020AE08, and grShrineRoute_8020AF38.
Find other stage files where StageData still uses raw address callback names instead of OnInit/OnLoad/OnStart/OnTouchLine/OnCheckShadowRender names.
Look for other ground-var layouts that store HSD_LObj pointer arrays and flag arrays with an object count, similar to xC8/x118/x168 in grShrineroute_GroundVars2.
Revisit grShrineroute_GroundVars2 field names once the semantics of the classifier-0xC GObj and its LObj list are understood.
